what_is_interesting: Odin — who sacrificed his eye and hung on Yggdrasil for nine sleepless nights to gain cosmic wisdom — is now the figure whose ancient stories carry modern listeners into sleep, a beautiful paradox at the heart of this video.
likely_image: A cloaked, bearded Odin figure against a dark, starlit Norse sky, possibly with ravens or the silhouette of Yggdrasil, rendered in deep blues and golds.
winner_reasoning: The god who sacrificed his eye and endured nine sleepless nights for wisdom now puts YOU to sleep — the paradox is instant, emotionally surprising, and combined with the image of Odin, makes a viewer think 'wait… how does that work?' and click.
